name: Weight Watchers Pasta Noodle Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine spaghetti, chicken, bean sprouts, scallions, bell pepper, and peanuts. Set aside.
2. In a blender, combine the remaining ingredients except lettuce and process on high speed until thoroughly combined.
3. Add the blended mixture to the spaghetti mixture and toss to coat.
4. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, about 30 minutes.
5. To serve, arrange lettuce around the edge of a serving platter. Fill the center with the chilled spaghetti mixture.
Each serving provides: 2 1/2 Protein Exchanges, 1 Bread exchange, 2 Vegetable exchanges, 1 1/2 Fat exchange, 680 mg Sodium, 38 mg Cholesterol. Note: Sometimes I use different vegetables, but the dressing is the best part.
